Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rene Perko appeared via zoom for the Archdiocese of San Francisco (beneficiary).

Discussion was held regarding a Public Administrator, that this sounds like a collection matter.

The Court shall invite The Public Administration to the next calling of the case. All matters are continued to June 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Renne Perko, Esq., for the Archdiocese of San Francisco.
No other appearances.

The court and counsel discuss this matter and of the Archdiocese's plans moving forward including of the possible request by the Archdiocese to appoint a neutral Administrator. The court advises of its intent to invite the San Francisco Public Administrator to the next calling to determine the possibility of appointing them as Administrator of this Estate.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Executor in pro per Jennifer Alice Grarelman for Apr-13-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $300.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to administer the Estate and why the court should Remove her as Executor. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Feb-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Renee Perko appeared via zoom for the Archdiocese of San Francisco.

Ms. Perko stated that she had never heard from Ms. Grafleman, and that she plans to file an 850 petition by next month.

All matters are continued to February 09, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Continued To Dec-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Continued To Dec-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court noted that Jennifer Alice Grafelman failed to appear despite prior orders, and that counsel for the Archdiocese of San Francisco had previously reached out to court staff requesting a continuance of today's hearing. The Court had advised that the matter would be called to determine whether Ms. Grafelman would attend.

The Court continued the matter to December 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court shall issue an Order for Ms. Grafelman to Appear on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Sep-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Renee Perko for the Archdiocese of San Francisco, Beneficiary (via Zoom).

The Court noted the absence of Jennifer Grafelman, despite prior orders directing her to appear and address the administration of the estate and the fulfillment of a 5% bequest to the Holy Name of Jesus Catholic Church.

Ms. Perko expressed disappointment at Ms. Grafelman's continued non-appearance and requested additional time to send another letter to her and explore legal remedies to recover the bequest, including the potential for penalties and attorney's fees.

The Court acknowledged the significance of honoring testamentary intent and discussed options, including potential removal of the personal representative, but deferred action at this time to allow the archdiocese to pursue voluntary resolution.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to September 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Order to Show Cause and Order to Appear were also continued to be heard on the same date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Elena Costas, Esq., for the Archdiocese of San Francisco, Beneficiary.

The court noted Ms. Grafelman's absence, of her continued failure to fulfill her duties as Executor, and of her continued disregard of the court's orders. Counsel believes that the Executor is currently working at the San Francisco Zoo and asks the court to consider serving the Executor at the Zoo. The court and counsel then discussed the church's interest in this matter and that they might consider the possible legal actions they might take if needed, after the next calling.

The court continued all matters to Jun-16-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Jennifer Alice Grafelman is ordered suspended as Executor. The court shall issue additional sanctions in the amount of $500 to Jennifer Alice Grafelman for her failure to appear. The court is to consider its options RE serving the now removed Executor.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Apr-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rene Perko for the Archdiocese of San Francisco, Beneficiary (via Zoom).

The court noted Ms. Grafelman's absence and failure to fulfill her duties as executor, including a significant bequest to the church and payment of legal fees. Ms. Perko expressed the church's interest in pursuing the bequest but requested additional time to decide on legal action, potentially filing a petition to act as successor executor.

The court continued all matters to April 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court shall issue sanctions in the amount of $250 to Jennifer Alice Grafelman for her failure to appear. The court shall also issue a citation to Ms. Grafelman to appear on April 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Jan-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rene Perko, appearing via Zoom on behalf of the Archdiocese of San Francisco (beneficiary).

Ms. Perko states that the Archdiocese was first notified of this matter in September upon receiving notice of the court's order imposing sanctions on Ms. Grafelman and confirms that the church has not received any funds from the estate. The court notes that Jennifer Alice Grafelman, who was ordered to appear today, is not present, and has not paid previously ordered sanctions or filed the required inventory, appraisal, or accounting.

The court will issue an order for Jennifer Grafelman to appear on January 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An additional $750 in sanctions shall be imposed for her failure to appear and for continued non-compliance with the court's orders. Renee Perko is instructed to attempt to contact Ms. Grafelman regarding the funds and provide a status update at the next hearing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Deputy: Singh; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Oct-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hua Jiang appeared by zoom for Jennifer Grafelman (petitioner).

Mrs. Jiang stated that she has not had any contact with Mrs. Grafelman since July of last year. Sanctions in the amount of $250.00 are ordered against Jennifer Grafelman for failure to appear. Said sanctions are to be paid within 10-days.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Jennifer Grafelman to appear on October 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she has not filed the required documents to close out this estate and to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $500.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Mrs. Jiang stated that she is not aware of any information regarding any amount of money (5%) being paid to the church. Status on close of estate and the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel are continued to October 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear/order to show cause is to be served by certified mail. A copy of the order to appear/order to show cause will also be served by certified mail to the Holy Name of Jesus Catholic Church and to the Archdiocese of San Francisco.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: E. Melendez. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Hua Jiang appearing via zoom for and with Jennifer Grafelman (petitioner).

Mrs. Jiang stated that no one has found the will and that she is not aware of anyone coming in to object. The Court stated that it agrees with the analysis that Probate Code 6124 presumption does not apply because the original will was with the petitioner after the decedent's death. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated September 21, 2019 is admitted to probate. Jennifer Alice Grafelman is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 03, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
